articles.title: Refund policy
articles.text: Refunds under $100 are processed automatically within 5 business days from Billing > Refunds. Refunds of $100 or more require a support agent to review the order before approval.

articles.title: Exporting your data
articles.text: To export your account data, go to Settings > Data > Export and choose CSV or JSON. The file is emailed to the account owner within an hour.

articles.title: Resetting your password
articles.text: Use the 'Forgot password' link on the login page to receive a reset email. Choose a new password and you are signed back in.

articles.title: Updating billing details
articles.text: Update your card under Settings > Billing > Payment method. Past invoices are available under Billing > Invoices and can be downloaded as a PDF.

articles.title: Changing your plan
articles.text: Upgrade or downgrade anytime under Settings > Plan. Upgrades are prorated immediately; downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.

articles.title: Adding team members
articles.text: Account owners add teammates under Settings > Team > Invite. Each seat is billed on the next invoice. Roles are owner, admin, and member.

articles.title: Using the API
articles.text: Generate an API key under Settings > Developer. The REST API base URL is https://api.example.com/v1 and is rate-limited to 600 requests per minute.

articles.title: Service status page
articles.text: Live system status and incident history are published at the public status page you can open in a browser.

articles.title: Service incident subscriptions
articles.text: Owners who subscribe are emailed and webhook-pinged the instant an incident begins, so you are informed of a disruption immediately rather than discovering it later.

articles.title: Embeddable status badge widget
articles.text: Place the live status badge on your own marketing site so customers can see at a glance the moment the platform went down or recovered; it refreshes as soon as our team flips an incident.

articles.title: Identity provider single sign-on
articles.text: A workspace may mandate that every member sign in through the organization's configured SAML provider rather than local credentials. The owner uploads provider metadata under Settings > Security.

articles.title: Where receipts are delivered
articles.text: After every successful payment an itemized receipt is automatically sent to the account owner's email address; it arrives in your mailbox and is not something you fetch manually.

articles.title: Closing your account
articles.text: When you leave us, an owner can request closure and we permanently wipe all of your stuff within 30 days. This cannot be undone.

articles.title: Outbound event webhooks
articles.text: We POST event notifications to whatever address you configure; delivery is retried with backoff and throttled to a few messages per minute to protect your endpoint.

articles.title: Read-only share links
articles.text: Give an outside person a read-only view by creating a public share link; they see the shared page without being given a seat in your workspace.
